data.title: Microservices Infrastructure
data.description: Instagram uses a microservices architecture to support its complex suite of features.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes containerization with Docker and orchestration with Kubernetes.

data.title: Load Balancers
data.description: Employs load balancing to manage the massive number of user requests efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes tools like Nginx and HAProxy for distributing traffic.

data.title: Database Management
data.description: Scalable database solutions to handle large volumes of data.
data.technical_spec: Uses both relational (PostgreSQL) and NoSQL (Cassandra) databases.

data.title: CDN Deployment
data.description: Content Delivery Networks optimize content delivery across geographies.
data.technical_spec: Partners with CDNs like Cloudflare and Akamai.

data.title: Real-time Data Processing
data.description: Supports real-time updates and notifications efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Event-driven architecture using Kafka and Redis.
